signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
U.S. spot XRP ETFs recorded $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16—the largest single-week inflow in three months, representing a 254% jump from the prior week[1]. Cumulative ETF inflows have reached $1.26 billion since the SEC lawsuit resolution[2].

signals.raw:
Powell March 19, 2026, Briefing: Expects Tariff Inflation to Stabilize Mid-Year After Court-Overturned Tariffs Replaced | NO** | **MED**  
Fed Chair Powell expressed slight confidence in tariff-related inflation easing mid-2026 as the administration replaces court-overturned tariffs, though levels are assumed to return to prior highs, amid broader services cooling but persistent pressures.[2]
